summary: Tested Bulk Category Editor fixes: (1) Wall & Floor Tiles category button works correctly with slug 'wall-floor-tiles', (2) Per-section product checklists (SectionProductScope) are present in all 3 sections (Categories, Filters, Specifications), (3) Section scoping works - selecting products shows 'Scoped to X of Y products' with amber badge. All backend API tests pass.
context_for_next_testing_agent: The Bulk Category Editor at /admin/supplier-products is fully functional. Key features verified: (1) Wall & Floor Tiles button has correct data-testid='cat-btn-wall-floor-tiles' and slug 'wall-floor-tiles', (2) SectionProductScope component exists in all 3 sections with data-testid='section-scope-toggle-{categories|filters|specifications}', (3) Clicking scope toggle expands product checklist, (4) Selecting products shows 'Scoped to X of Y products' text and amber badge, (5) Backend API /api/supplier-sync/products/bulk-update-unified accepts Wall & Floor Tiles in sub_categories.

verified_working.categories_section: Shows 11 categories including Wall & Floor Tiles
verified_working.filters_section: Shows 16 filter types with scope toggle
verified_working.section_product_scope_categories: Expands to show 17 products, scoping works
verified_working.wall_floor_tiles_button: Found with data-testid='cat-btn-wall-floor-tiles', clicks and highlights green
verified_working.scoped_badge: Shows '3 scoped' amber badge when products selected in scope
verified_working.backend_categories_api: Returns Wall & Floor Tiles with slug 'wall-floor-tiles'
verified_working.backend_bulk_update_api: Accepts Wall & Floor Tiles in sub_categories

test_details.test_1_login: SUCCESS - Logged in with qasim@tilestation.co.uk / admin123
test_details.test_3_product_selection: SUCCESS - Can select products via checkboxes
test_details.test_4_bulk_category_editor_sections: SUCCESS - All 3 sections (Categories, Filters, Specifications) render correctly
test_details.test_5_section_product_scope_component: SUCCESS - Found 3 section scope toggles with data-testid
test_details.test_6_scope_selection: SUCCESS - Selecting 3 products shows 'Scoped to 3 of 17 products' and '3 scoped' badge
test_details.test_7_wall_floor_tiles_button: SUCCESS - Button found with data-testid='cat-btn-wall-floor-tiles', clicks and turns green
test_details.test_8_filters_specs_scope: SUCCESS - Both Filters and Specifications sections have scope toggles with 17 products each
test_details.backend_test_categories_api: PASSED - Wall & Floor Tiles has slug 'wall-floor-tiles'
test_details.backend_test_bulk_update: PASSED - API accepts Wall & Floor Tiles in sub_categories
test_details.backend_test_filters_specs: PASSED - API accepts filters and specifications
